title: Planning Graph Edges Schema
description: Schema for Planning Graph edge definitions used by SSA Planning Graph.

$schema.description: Optional JSON Schema URI for this document.

id.description: Identifier for this edge set document (e.g., 'planningGraphEdges').

graphId.description: Logical ID of the graph this edge list belongs to (e.g., 'planningGraph').

label.description: Human-readable label for this edge set.

version.description: Semantic version string for this edge definition document (e.g., '1.0.0').

updatedAt.description: ISO 8601 timestamp for when this edge document was last updated.

edges.description: List of directed edges between Planning Graph nodes.

from.description: Source node ID (must match a node.id in planningGraph.nodes.json).

to.description: Target node ID (must match a node.id in planningGraph.nodes.json).

weight.description: Relative importance/strength of this edge for flow and recommendation logic.

meta.description: Free-form metadata for this edge, such as mapping outputs to inputs or notes.

via.description: Optional: name of the output field on the source node.

into.description: Optional: name of the input field on the target node.

notes.description: Optional: human-readable notes about this edge.
